content.text:
I’ve opened the AmericasIns Mapping Rules for you.

Where the split is determined
- Each split is defined explicitly in the TransactionMapping nodes under each business unit (e.g., FutuRe/AmericasIns/TransactionMapping contains nodes like AME-HOMEOWNERS-PROP 85% and AME-HOMEOWNERS-CAS 15%).
- The Mapping Rules Markdown document summarises those mappings (and is what I displayed).
- At query time the Profitability hub applies these TransactionMapping entries virtually to transform local BU amounts into group LoBs — so the split values are stored in the TransactionMapping nodes (and summarised in MappingRules), not computed dynamically elsewhere.

Next actions
- I can list the individual TransactionMapping nodes for AmericasIns so you can inspect each mapping record.
- Or show the EuropeRe mappings as well.
Which would you like?
